page_content:
Prerequisite: HESP400.

Restriction: Must be in Hearing and Speech Sciences program.

HESP416 Principles and Methods in Audiology (2 Credits)

Relate previous knowledge of anatomy/physiology and pathologies of the auditory system and integrate this information into clinical application. Prerequisite: Minimum grade of C- in HESP411.

Restriction: Must be in Hearing and Speech Sciences program; and permission of BSOS-Hearing & Speech Sciences department.
